name: Mobile CI/CD Pipeline
description: Fastlane + Expo mobile app build, test, and App Store deployment automation

parameters.js: const h = $input.item.json.headers; const event = h['x-github-event']; const branch = $input.item.json.ref; return [{event, branch}];
parameters.name: Parse GitHub Event

parameters.prompt: Generate Fastlane release notes from these commits: {{ $json.commits }}. Be concise, 2-3 bullet points.
